Walk through the visible environmental changes and object interactions from the beginning to the end of the clip.
canonical_answer: At 2s, the view switches to a first-person landscape with a white pillar; at 4s, a red and white particle explosion blooms in the sky; at 8s, a dispenser block with a wooden top appears on sand; at 18s, the player holds a grey bucket filled with blue liquid.
